creator: flz@xbsd.org
text:
I don't think this is a good idea as there's no drop-in replacement
for xorg-fonts. Liberation and webfonts are additional truetype fonts
but they can't replace xorg truetype fonts.

These macros were useful when multiple versions of the X distributions
were supported in the ports tree. Now there's only one and the only
reason why those macros aren't gone yet is because I haven't got to
removing them.

-- 
Florent Thoumie
flz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Committer
